diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_checkpoint.py
+++ b/inspect_checkpoint.py
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+import torch

+import sys

+

+ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False)

+print('=== Model Config ===')

+print(ckpt['model_config'])

+print()

+print('=== State Dict Keys ===')

+for k in sorted(ckpt['model_state_dict'].keys()):

+    print(k)
